candidate_llm_application: Multi-agent LLM with bidirectional artifact exchange where one agent generates content (photobiont analog) and the other refines/validates (mycobiont analog); membrane = JSON schema with adaptive field-permission rules that loosen under disagreement and tighten under agreement.
